title: Copper Kit
description: Hate digging for a bunch of copper? Here's a new solution to make them even more useful.
body:
![copper kit banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32644963960a2a7cb96333718b77124e412919c0.png) # Main Sorry, due to the author's limited energy, we are unable to develop a mod that supports multiple loaders. Currently, we only support neoforge. This is a simple copper-based expansion module that provides more practical recipes, including various tools, armor and other items; That's all 🤪🤪🤪
# Introduction ## Features **copper sheet**: A raw material synthesized from copper ingots, and items made from it must use iron or above to be mined; **copper bucket**: you can fill it with lava,but you will get 1 or 2 copper ingot when empty it; **copper bomb**: copper firecracker is cheaper and explodes when hit any entity. **copper knife**: Right-click to use a 4s delayed magic. It can directly kill any entity with a health value less than 80%, but it will also provide penalties, such as a proportional reduction in durability. **Copper bowls**：It can be used to make mushroom soup and other foods, as copper is a heavy metal that may trigger negative buff when consumed. You can put it in a furnace or cook it over a campfire, and it will immediately restore the specified health after consumption
## Recipe here the special item recipes. other copper tools and sword which are held vanilla recipe struction. for ingredient ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/349977e096011eba15091594a2804379a7d8e33e.png) for items ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f088fbf3b18e2c757432063302cfb928ce271a8.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/546843562a57d7e3eca27340a0a39ee4a0adc136.png)
## Update **This mod was added following items or blocks:** copper nugget copper fragment copper shears copper sword, pickaxe, axe, hoe, shovel copper armor copper firecracker, grenade copper buckets copper knife copper bowls copper bow
